title: charoite
description: A purple themed 64x texturepack for modern minecraft versions
body:
# Charoite 64x

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f78ab2d3ffcb9d2209519b0055ad310d3bd3d29b.jpeg)
## Description

**Charoite** is a rich, purple-themed 64x resource pack designed to elevate the classic Minecraft aesthetic with a bold and mystical twist. Inspired by the natural gemstone, this pack reimagines vanilla textures with deep violet tones and refined detailing—perfect for builders, adventurers, and anyone who wants their world to shine with a bit of arcane beauty.

* Faithful to vanilla design with a fresh, purple palette
* Crisp 64x resolution for added depth and detail
* Smooth, cohesive visuals that don’t stray far from the original Minecraft feel

---

## Features

* Overhauled blocks and items with purple-themed textures
* Enhanced shading and color depth in a 64x resolution
* Consistent with vanilla geometry and structure

---

## Installation Guide

1. Download the `.zip` file
2. Move it into your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder
3. Open Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs
4. Enable **Charoite** in your list

---

## Feedback & Community

Have suggestions, screenshots, or just want to connect with others using the pack?
Join the conversation here: [https://discord.gg/factory](https://discord.gg/factory)

---
